title: Luscious Lyon Miso Bouillon
description: A pungent and comforting dish from Lyon, France, featuring a rich miso-marinate and sweet maple syrup. Serve in a copper mug for an authentic experience.
instructions: Combine maple syrup, miso paste, and 1 tablespoon of chicken broth in the bottom of a copper mug to create a marinade.
Thinly slice the onion and separate into rings.
Mince the garlic and add to the mug with the marinade.
Thinly slice the thyme and add to the mug with the marinade.
Add the bay leaves to the mug with the marinade.
Pour in the remaining chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for 10 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Stir in the heavy cream and let cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the cream has thickened slightly.
Remove from heat and stir in the unsalted butter until melted.
Strain the soup through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean copper mug and discard the solids.
